span.p:
getirbakim-nginx
reverse proxy + TLS (Let's Encrypt)
:80 / :443 · client_max_body_size 10M

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
bakimx-app container
Next.js 16 standalone · Node 22-alpine
:3000 · mem limit 2g · alias bakimx-app

span.p:
bakimx db container
PostgreSQL 16-alpine
:5432 · mem limit 1g · volume pgdata

span.p:
pg_dump cron 03:15 · 7-day retention
(optional rclone offsite to R2/B2)
